# Context Agora

> System for selecting and loading context modules into a coding agent's workspace.

## Platform Backend
- [platform/src/config.py](platform/src/config.py) — Centralized Pydantic Settings class; all env vars and derived paths; import `settings` from here, never read os.environ directly
- [platform/src/server.py](platform/src/server.py) — FastAPI app factory, constants, SPA fallback, entry point
- [platform/src/models.py](platform/src/models.py) — Pydantic request/response models
- [platform/src/llms.py](platform/src/llms.py) — llms.txt generation and parsing helpers
- [platform/src/routes/modules.py](platform/src/routes/modules.py) — Module CRUD and file CRUD endpoints
- [platform/src/routes/workspace.py](platform/src/routes/workspace.py) — Workspace load, secrets endpoints
- [platform/src/routes/chat.py](platform/src/routes/chat.py) — Chat SSE streaming that records events into the sessions DB via transcript_recorder; `GET /api/sessions` (list) and `GET /api/sessions/{id}/messages` (hydrate transcript, DB-first with JSONL fallback) via claude_sessions service
- [platform/src/routes/health.py](platform/src/routes/health.py) — Health check endpoint
- [platform/src/routes/files.py](platform/src/routes/files.py) — File download endpoint (GET /api/files/download) with path validation against CONTEXT_DIR and /tmp
- [platform/src/routes/commands.py](platform/src/routes/commands.py) — Slash commands listing endpoint (GET /api/commands) from static COMMANDS registry
- [platform/src/commands.py](platform/src/commands.py) — Thin slash-command registry (CommandDef + COMMANDS list); loads prompts from .md files, no inline prompts
- [platform/src/prompts/llms.txt](platform/src/prompts/llms.txt) — Prompt directory: commands/ (user-facing slash commands) and templates/ (internal prompts)
- [platform/src/prompts/_conventions.md](platform/src/prompts/_conventions.md) — Single source of truth for varlock, TRY markers, secret naming, and execution conventions; auto-injected into all prompts
- [platform/src/services/claude.py](platform/src/services/claude.py) — Single source of truth for spawning the claude CLI (run_headless, stream); unified env build (telemetry-off + LLM_* → ANTHROPIC_* mapping)
- [platform/src/services/claude_sessions.py](platform/src/services/claude_sessions.py) — Reads Claude Code's on-disk session transcripts (~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/*.jsonl); pure functions claude_project_dir, first_user_message, list_sessions, read_transcript (parses JSONL into frontend ChatMessage shape), load_session_messages (DB-first via sessions_store, JSONL fallback); no state
- [platform/src/services/sessions_store.py](platform/src/services/sessions_store.py) — SQLite DAO for chat messages (open_db, ensure_schema, save_message, list_messages); no ORM, stdlib sqlite3
- [platform/src/services/transcript_recorder.py](platform/src/services/transcript_recorder.py) — Pure in-memory builder that turns SSE events into ChatMessage records for persistence; mirrors useChatStore.sendMessage
- [platform/src/services/git_repo.py](platform/src/services/git_repo.py) — Local git clone wrapper (clone, read/write, sync_status/pull/push)
- [platform/src/routes/sync.py](platform/src/routes/sync.py) — Sync API endpoints (GET /api/sync/status, POST /api/sync/pull, POST /api/sync/push)
- [platform/src/routes/jobs.py](platform/src/routes/jobs.py) — Job listing, run history, and manual trigger endpoints (GET /api/jobs, GET /api/jobs/{module}/{name}/runs, POST /api/jobs/{module}/{name}/run)
- [platform/frontend/src/api/sync.ts](platform/frontend/src/api/sync.ts) — Sync API client (fetchSyncStatus, pullSync, pushSync)
- [platform/frontend/src/api/jobs.ts](platform/frontend/src/api/jobs.ts) — Jobs API client (fetchJobs, fetchJobRuns, triggerJob; Job and JobRun types)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/SyncControls.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/SyncControls.tsx) — Pull/Push buttons driven by sync status
- [platform/src/services/manifest.py](platform/src/services/manifest.py) — ModuleManifest Pydantic model + read_manifest/write_manifest I/O; replaces per-module .env.schema and requirements.txt with a single module.yaml
- [platform/src/services/jobs.py](platform/src/services/jobs.py) — In-process JobScheduler: ticks every 30s, fires due module cron jobs as subprocesses, supports manual trigger_now; RunRecord + module-level singleton
- [platform/src/services/schemas.py](platform/src/services/schemas.py) — generate_global_schema(dict[str,list[str]]) builds workspace .env.schema from manifest secret lists; validate_module_name/validate_module_file_path for input sanitization
- [platform/src/services/workspace.py](platform/src/services/workspace.py) — Workspace management: list_loaded_modules, get_loaded_module_names, reload_workspace (clear and re-link modules into context directory)
- [platform/src/services/secrets.py](platform/src/services/secrets.py) — Varlock secret status and loading
- [platform/frontend/](platform/frontend/) — React SPA (Vite + TanStack Router + TanStack Query)
- [platform/frontend/src/api/](platform/frontend/src/api/) — API client layer (fetch wrapper, modules, workspace, chat, sessions, commands)
- [platform/frontend/src/api/commands.ts](platform/frontend/src/api/commands.ts) — Slash commands API client (fetchCommands, Command type)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/chat/SlashCommandSelector.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/chat/SlashCommandSelector.tsx) — Slash command dropdown selector component and useSlashCommands hook
- [platform/frontend/src/components/chat/MentionSelector.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/chat/MentionSelector.tsx) — @-mention file picker component (MentionSelector), useMentionPicker hook, and findActiveMention utility
- [platform/frontend/src/components/chat/DecisionTreePanel.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/chat/DecisionTreePanel.tsx) — Tree navigation visualization with breadcrumbs and module access counts
- [platform/frontend/src/api/sessions.ts](platform/frontend/src/api/sessions.ts) — Sessions API client (fetchSessions, fetchSessionMessages; SessionInfo type)
- [platform/frontend/src/hooks/useSessionStore.ts](platform/frontend/src/hooks/useSessionStore.ts) — Zustand store holding only `activeClaudeSessionId` (localStorage-persisted); session list comes from the server
- [platform/frontend/src/components/](platform/frontend/src/components/) — React components (Chat, ModuleRegistry, IconRail, ContextPanel, etc.)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/ModuleCard.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/ModuleCard.tsx) — Unified card component for tasks and integrations; renders name, summary, files, secrets, packages with expand/collapse
- [platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/WorkspaceGroup.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/WorkspaceGroup.tsx) — Collapsible integrations group with root files (CLAUDE.md, llms.txt), integration cards with ON/OFF toggles, and create/refresh actions
- [platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/JobsPanel.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/JobsPanel.tsx) — Sidebar panel listing all scheduled jobs with status dots, schedule cadence, last-run time, and inline Run button; polls every 5s
- [platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/JobRunsModal.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/JobRunsModal.tsx) — Modal showing the run history for a single job with expandable stdout/stderr panes; polls every 5s
- [platform/frontend/src/components/Modal.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/Modal.tsx) — Shared modal wrapper: backdrop, click-outside, Escape-key handling with opt-out props
- [platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/ArchiveModal.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/ArchiveModal.tsx) — Modal for managing archived tasks with unarchive and delete actions
- [platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/CreateTaskModal.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/sidebar/CreateTaskModal.tsx) — Modal dialog for creating a new task module; posts to createTask API and invalidates modules/workspace queries on success
- [platform/frontend/src/routes/](platform/frontend/src/routes/) — TanStack Router file-based routes
- [platform/frontend/src/utils/humanizeToolCall.ts](platform/frontend/src/utils/humanizeToolCall.ts) — Utility to translate raw tool call names/args into human-readable labels with module resolution
- [platform/Dockerfile](platform/Dockerfile) — Multi-stage container image (Node build + Python runtime)
## Landing Page
- [landing/](landing/) — Astro-based landing site and deploy guide
- [landing/src/pages/index.astro](landing/src/pages/index.astro) — Landing page home
- [landing/src/pages/deploy.astro](landing/src/pages/deploy.astro) — Deploy guide page (imports docs/guides/deployment.md)
- [landing/src/components/ArchitectureDiagram.astro](landing/src/components/ArchitectureDiagram.astro) — Animated SVG architecture diagram showing modules flowing into the agent workspace

## Self-Hosting
- [docker-compose.yml](docker-compose.yml) — Docker Compose for deployment (pulls image) and dev (--build)
- [.env.example](.env.example) — Environment variable template for self-hosted deployment
- [.github/workflows/publish.yml](.github/workflows/publish.yml) — CI workflow to build and push image to GHCR

## Active Plans
- [docs/plans/active/20-module-types-and-support-workflow.md](docs/plans/active/20-module-types-and-support-workflow.md) — Plan: Module types (integration/workflow) and self-improving support playbook system

## Archived Plans
- [docs/plans/archive/](docs/plans/archive/) — Historical plans (filebrowser, CLI, module management, MCP server, commercialization)

## Guides
- [docs/guides/deployment.md](docs/guides/deployment.md) — End-user deployment guide (Docker, env vars, HTTPS, troubleshooting)
- [docs/guides/additional-instance-cloudflare.md](docs/guides/additional-instance-cloudflare.md) — Internal ops: deploy another ContextAgora instance behind the shared Cloudflare tunnel + Zero Trust Access, including clean decommission steps
- [docs/guides/varlock.md](docs/guides/varlock.md) — Varlock secret management system explained
- [docs/guides/writing-efficient-scripts.md](docs/guides/writing-efficient-scripts.md) — Guidelines for writing network-efficient scripts
- [docs/guides/debugging-claude-timing.md](docs/guides/debugging-claude-timing.md) — Methodology for measuring Claude Code chat timing
- [docs/guides/module-manifest-migration.md](docs/guides/module-manifest-migration.md) — Migrate modules from .env.schema + requirements.txt to module.yaml

## Ideas
- [docs/ideas/info.md](docs/ideas/info.md) — Foundational concept: modular context for AI agents

## Reference
- [STATUS.md](STATUS.md) — What the system is, how it's built, current state (load every conversation)
- [DECISIONS.md](DECISIONS.md) — Architectural decisions and rationale (load when planning or changing things)
